name: Week 1 Push (Chest/Shoulders/Triceps)
description: Foundation push day grouped by station — bench work first, then dumbbells, then cables. Minimizes equipment switching in a crowded gym. All fixed exercises for tracking progression.

exercises.notes: Easy reps, get blood flowing to chest and tris
Flat barbell bench. Plant feet, arch slightly, drive through chest. Add weight when you hit 4×8.
Adjust bench to 30-45°. Controlled descent, press up and slightly in. Grab DBs before you start.
Seated or standing. Full lockout overhead, controlled descent to ears.
Same dumbbells but lighter — or grab a second pair. Lead with elbows, slight lean forward.
High or mid-cable. Slight forward lean, big stretch, squeeze at center.
Drop the weight, single arm cross-body. Constant tension.
Swap to rope or V-bar. Elbows pinned, full extension, squeeze at bottom.

tips: Grouped by station — claim one spot, do all your work there, move on
Bench station is your main lift — focus on progressive overload here
Cable station: just swap the attachment between exercises, no need to move
Rest 2 min between bench sets, 60s between isolation sets
Total volume: ~16 working sets for push muscles
